title: treculia obovoidea
intro: Treculia obovoidea, also known as the "African milk tree", is a species of tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which is used to treat various health conditions. The bark of Treculia obovoidea has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other medicinal plants to create remedies for various health issues, such as treating digestive problems and reducing fever, and is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion.
